article.body_preview:
DHAKA, May 13, 2023 (BSS) - Prime Minister Sheikh Hasina today called upon the engineers, key-force of the country's development, to uphold Bangladesh's existing development spree.

"The trend of development of Bangladesh has to be continued and it's my only expectation to you (engineers). . . InshAllah, none could stop the development journey of Bangladesh," she said while addressing the inaugural ceremony of the 60th convention of the Institution of Engineers, Bangladesh (IEB) as the chief gue

llm_connections.evidence_quote: Bangladesh will not purchase anything from any country if it imposes sanctions.
llm_connections.scope_justification: The quote describes a national-level decision to stop purchasing from sanctioning countries, which directly concerns aggregate country-wide imports, matching the balance_of_trade scope.
